# ADR-NNNN: &lt;Title&gt;

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by ADR-XXXX | Deprecated
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** &lt;names / roles&gt;

## Context

What is the issue motivating this decision? What forces are at play — technical,
organizational, regulatory, accessibility, budget? Link to the relevant
requirements section or GitHub issue.

## Decision

What is the change that we're making? Write it in the imperative mood, as a
directive for the team.

## Consequences

What becomes easier? What becomes harder? What do we commit to maintaining? What
doors does this close?

## Alternatives considered

- **&lt;Alt A&gt;** — why it was rejected (cost / capability / risk)
- **&lt;Alt B&gt;** — why it was rejected

## Links

- requirements.md §&lt;section&gt;
- Related ADRs
- External references
